records.summary_analyst: CVE-2025-49113 affects Roundcube Webmail by allowing an attacker to exploit improper input validation, leading to potential remote code execution through crafted email messages.

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2024-43468 involves a remote code execution vulnerability in Microsoft Configuration Manager 2403, allowing an attacker to exploit certain input validation weaknesses to execute arbitrary code on the affected system.

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-1731 affects Beyondtrust Privileged Remote Access by allowing remote attackers to exploit an authentication bypass vulnerability due to improper validation of user credentials, potentially granting unauthorized access to sensitive systems.

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-22769 affects Dell RecoverPoint for Virtual Machines by allowing an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code on the server through a vulnerability in the application's handling of specially crafted requests.

records.description: CVE-2026-22769 affects Dell RecoverPoint for Virtual Machines by allowing an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code on the server through a vulnerability in the application's handling of specially crafted requests.
